name: Nutrition Agent
description: An AI-powered Nutrition Agent built with IBM Watsonx Granite model and Flask. Provides personalized meal plans, BMI calculation, food analysis, family nutrition plans, and healthy recipes.

IBM_API_KEY.description: IBM Cloud API Key for authenticating with IBM Watsonx.ai

GRANITE_MODEL_ID.description: IBM Granite model ID to use for inference

FLASK_SECRET_KEY.description: Flask secret key for session signing

FLASK_DEBUG.description: Enable Flask debug mode (set False in production)

PORT.description: Port the Flask app listens on
